overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (The Witcher 3) showing a white-haired witcher character exploring a rustic log cabin interior at night. The character holds a torch for illumination while approaching an NPC woman near the fireplace and exploring the room's perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic log cabin main room entrance area

events.description: character moves from corner entrance into the main living area of the cabin
slowing down to approach the woman standing near the fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden cabin holding a lit torch, illuminating the log walls and wooden floor while approaching the woman

notable_agents.action: woman with dark hair in white blouse and fur vest standing with hands on hips near the fireplace

entered.detail: thick vertical wooden beams supporting the ceiling structure
wooden barrel with metal bands near the wall
straw thatch ceiling visible between wooden support beams
large sack of goods resting on the wooden floor
small wooden cabinet with pottery and items on top
large metal hood over the stone fireplace in the background

segments.scene_description: The character enters a rustic log cabin interior illuminated by torchlight, revealing wooden support beams, a thatched ceiling, and a barrel near the wall. The character walks forward across wooden floor planks toward a woman standing near the fireplace, passing a sack of goods and a small cabinet.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin interior near fireplace with multiple occupants

events.description: stopping to face the woman and engage in conversation
turning right and walking toward the fireplace area

agents.ego_description: facing the woman in conversation near the fireplace, then turning to walk toward the men by the fire

notable_agents.action: woman engaging in dialogue with the player character, maintaining stance with hands on hips
man in red clothing tending to the fire under the metal hood

entered.detail: round wooden table with various items placed on top
simple wooden bench positioned near the table
wall-mounted wooden shelves holding bottles and pottery

segments.scene_description: The character stops to face the woman near the fireplace, engaging in conversation in the warm firelight. Afterward, the character turns right and walks toward the fireplace where a man in red tends the fire, revealing a wooden table and bench while the barrel and sack pass out of view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin perimeter near back wall with windows

events.description: pausing to look at the wooden window showing darkness outside
turning left to follow the wall back toward the room entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the cabin's back wall, observing the wooden construction and window, then turning to circle back

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing standing near the back wall shelves observing the room

entered.detail: small window with wooden shutters showing dark night sky outside
doorway with wooden frame leading to another area or outside
wooden barrel visible again as the character circles back

segments.scene_description: The character explores the cabin's perimeter, walking along the log walls and pausing to observe a window showing the night outside. Passing wall-mounted shelves and a doorway, the character circles back toward the entrance area, with the barrel reappearing in view as the fireplace and table pass behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic log cabin, transitioning from an initial entry into a detailed exploration of the interior's perimeter. It begins as the character enters the room under torchlight, moving across wooden floor planks past a barrel and a sack of goods toward a woman standing by the fireplace. As the conversation ends, the camera shifts right toward the warmth of the hearth where a man in red tends the fire, revealing a wooden table and bench as the previous objects fade from view. The scene then expands to follow the character along the log walls, pausing at a window overlooking the night before passing wall-mounted shelves and a doorway. Finally, the camera circles back toward the entrance area, bringing the barrel back into view as the fireplace and table recede behind.
